title: RFC 9309: Robots Exclusion Protocol
note: Primary standard for robots.txt behavior, matching rules, redirects, caching, and the warning that robots.txt is not access authorization.

title: RFC 9110: HTTP Semantics
note: Primary HTTP semantics source for safe methods, redirects, Location handling, and User-Agent guidance.

title: Python urllib.parse documentation
note: Official URL parsing documentation with security warnings about validation and urljoin with attacker-controlled input.

title: OWASP Server-Side Request Forgery Prevention Cheat Sheet
note: Official OWASP defensive guidance for URL-controlled fetches, allowlists, parser abuse, and network-layer containment.

title: OWASP LLM Prompt Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet
note: Official OWASP guidance for treating external content as untrusted, action screening, least privilege, and quarantine/dual-model patterns.

title: CommonMark Spec 0.31.2
note: Primary Markdown syntax source, useful for noting that Markdown may include HTML blocks and raw HTML inlines depending on rendering.

title: Microsoft MarkItDown repository
note: Official converter documentation that frames Markdown conversion for LLM/text analysis and warns that conversion performs I/O with current-process privileges.
